body: {"registration":{"category":"New Application","application":"PETRONAS Smart Maintenance Portal","title":"HLD for Predictive Maintenance System","description":"A cloud-based predictive scanning","Watermarking"]},"cybersecurity":{"bia":{"confidentiality":"High","integrity":"High","availability":"Medium","overall":"High"},"ha":["Active-Passive","Multi-AZ"],"dr":["Warm Standby","RPO
